displayTitle: Classic Star Wars: Han Solo at Stars' End #1
synopsis: Classic Star Wars: Han Solo at Stars' End 1 is the first issue of the Star Wars Legends comic book miniseries Classic Star Wars: Han Solo at Stars' End, which collects material originally printed in the 1980-1981 comic strip of the same name, which was written by Archie Goodwin and illustrated by Alfredo Alcala and adapted of the 1979 novel of the same name by Brian Daley. The issue was published by Dark Horse Comics on March 26, 1997.
title: Classic Star Wars: Han Solo at Stars' End #1
